title: Pipelines
description: Build node-processing flows by dragging operators

empty.title: No pipelines yet
empty.description: Create your first pipeline to automate node filtering and renaming

delete_confirm.title: Delete pipeline
delete_confirm.description: Delete "{{name}}"? All subscription bindings will be detached.

editor.title: Edit pipeline
editor.param_panel_placeholder: Select an operator to edit its parameters
editor.canvas_run_to_view: Run preview to view node counts
editor.canvas_empty_title: Drag an operator from the left to start
editor.canvas_empty_description: Six operators available: filter / map / sort / dedupe / regex-rename / output
editor.todo_t21: Parameter forms, YAML view and debug preview will land in T-21

filter.expr_help: Fields: name / server / port / protocol / tag / region / network / tls; operators: ==, !=, in, &&, ||, !, (), string / number literals

map.field_help: Writable: name / server / port / tag / network / sni / host / path / password

dedupe.fields_placeholder: Press enter to add a field, e.g. server
dedupe.fields_help: Defaults to server + port when empty

output.max_nodes_help: Truncated in input order when exceeded

common.no_selection_description: Click an operator card on the canvas to edit its parameters

preview.title: Debug preview
preview.no_result_description: Enter a subscription ID and click "Run preview" to inspect per-operator I/O diffs
preview.no_steps: Debug mode disabled or no operators in pipeline

filter.name: Filter
filter.description: Filter nodes by expression, e.g. region in ['hk','jp']

map.name: Map
map.description: Set or override a node field

sort.name: Sort
sort.description: Sort nodes ascending or descending by a key

dedupe.name: Dedupe
dedupe.description: Remove duplicates by a tuple of fields

regex_rename.name: Regex rename
regex_rename.description: Batch rename node tags using a regular expression

output.name: Output
output.description: Select output format: Clash / Clash-Meta / raw

errors.ERR_NOT_FOUND_PIPELINE: Pipeline not found or already deleted
errors.ERR_PIPELINE_OPERATOR_UNKNOWN: Pipeline contains an unknown operator type
errors.ERR_CONFLICT_PIPELINE_VERSION: Pipeline was modified by another client; please refresh and retry
errors.PIPELINE_VALIDATION_FAILED: Pipeline validation failed, check operator parameters
